name: polidict
title: Polidict
description: Master new vocabulary with spaced repetition, AI-powered definitions, and curated word collections
author: solomkinmv

commands.name: lookup-word
commands.title: Lookup Word
commands.description: Search for words and get definitions from blueprints or AI

commands.name: view-vocabulary
commands.title: View Vocabulary
commands.description: Browse, filter, and manage your vocabulary

commands.name: start-training
commands.title: Start Training
commands.description: Practice vocabulary with quizzes and flashcards

commands.name: quick-add-word
commands.title: Quick Add Word
commands.description: Save a word from typed text or the current selection

commands.name: manage-groups
commands.title: Manage Groups
commands.description: Create, edit, and delete vocabulary groups

commands.name: view-stats
commands.title: View Stats
commands.description: View your learning streak, training history, and progress

preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: Override the Polidict API base URL for local or staging environments.
